core_skills: Software development, TypeScript, React, Python, RESTful APIs
skill_match_scores: Software development:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, React:1.0, Python:1.0, RESTful APIs:1.0
must_have_quals: Solid experience in software development, Strong experience with TypeScript, React, and Python, Experience designing and developing RESTful APIs, Solid understanding of SDLC and Agile methodologies, Experience with data transformations (PySpark, SQL), Strong adaptability and eagerness to learn new technologies
preferred_quals: Knowledge of additional languages such as C# and JavaScript, Familiarity with Foundry
core_responsibilities: Design and develop web applications and backend services using TypeScript and Python, Build and enhance interactive dashboards using React, Collaborate with product managers, designers, and engineers to deliver technical solutions, Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices, Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve performance and software issues, Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement
job_summary: Avenue Code is seeking a motivated Front-end Engineer to join a strategic and innovative project, working with modern technologies such as TypeScript, React, and Python. In this role, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build scalable web applications and deliver high-impact solutions that meet both business and user needs.
